parameters.description: Send notifications to your own GroupMe destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise groupme:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your GroupMe bot post URL from your stored secrets and POST a native GroupMe {bot_id, text} payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"bot_id":"${ customer_secrets.GROUPME_MSG_BOT_ID }","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to GroupMe bot post API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment GroupMe destinations, direct

bot_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's GroupMe bot id
